<!--
Thanks for contributing!

If you're adding a resource, edit `data/entries/<category>.yml` — NOT the
generated README files directly. The three READMEs are regenerated from the
YAML on push to master.

The auto-review bot will grade this PR against RUBRIC.md and post a
structured comment. Score breakdown is advisory; the maintainer makes the
final call.
-->

## What this PR adds / changes

<!-- One sentence. -->

## Self-checklist (mirrors RUBRIC.md)

- [ ] URL is reachable, returns 2xx, prefers HTTPS, no redirect chain
- [ ] Resource has non-trivial content depth (not a marketing or lead-gen page)
- [ ] `category` value matches the resource topic
- [ ] I searched for similar entries; this adds a distinct angle
- [ ] All required schema fields are filled (`id`, `url`, `title`, `category`, `type`, `languages`, `difficulty`, `date_added`, `status`)
- [ ] Edited `data/entries/*.yml`, NOT `README*.md` directly

## Justification (1–2 sentences)

<!-- Why this resource is worth adding. -->
